ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal before taxes and shipping */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `addresses` table to store the billing address */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `addresses` table to store the shipping address */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code applied to the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `addresses` table to store the user's default address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of items ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of each item */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Price of the item after any discounts are applied */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the item */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_quantity" INTEGER /* Current inventory quantity */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `categories` table to store the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `brands` table to store the product brand */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID provided by the payment processor */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card used */,
  "card_last_4" TEXT /* Last 4 digits of the credit card number */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `addresses` table to store the billing address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the shipping record belongs to */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier (e.g., USPS, UPS) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the status record belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_history" (
  "inventory_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory history record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that the history record belongs to */,
  "quantity_change" INTEGER /* Change in inventory quantity */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory quantity was changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was changed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, customer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)
